name: Sessions Worktree Injector
description: Rewrites sessions_spawn task strings so each subagent works in its own git worktree instead of sharing the parent's checkout. Prevents concurrent-edit clobbers between parallel builders on different branches. Default mode is 'log' (observe-only) until verified; flip to 'rewrite' to enable the rewrite.

mode.description: off=disabled, log=detect+log only, rewrite=rewrite task to use worktree

repoRoot.description: Path inside the container to the repo whose branches the orchestrator dispatches against.

worktreeBase.description: Parent dir for per-subagent worktrees. Pair with `git worktree prune` cron for cleanup.
